pi_items.source: Verified via setup_task.sh and export_result.sh database queries (WHERE store_id=1). Inline store creation in setup_drupal_commerce.sh creates single default store.

Verified against task description and README.md. Store location is specified as San Francisco, California in description (line 1 of task.json). America/Los_Angeles is the standard IANA timezone for Pacific Time zone where San Francisco is located. Matches README success criteria (line 21).

Verified against task description. Task requirement in task.json line 3: 'Change the store's address line from '456 Market Street' to '100 Commerce Boulevard''. Initial address confirmed in setup_drupal_commerce.sh line 231 as '456 Market Street'. Expected value matches task description and README success criteria (line 23).

Verified against task description. Task requirement in task.json line 2: 'Add 'US' to the store's tax registration countries'. Matches README success criteria (line 22) and verifier.py check (line 82: 'if 'US' in tax_countries.upper()').

Verified against task description. Task requirement in task.json line 4: 'Create a new customer account with username 'taxmanager''. Username is hardcoded in export_result.sh (line 45: WHERE name='taxmanager') and setup_task.sh (line 48: user:cancel taxmanager). Matches README success criteria (line 24).

Verified against task description. Task requirement in task.json line 4: 'Create a new customer account with...email 'tax@urbanelectronics.com''. Email is validated in verifier.py (line 115: metadata.get('expected_new_email', 'tax@urbanelectronics.com')).

Verified against setup_drupal_commerce.sh line 233: default store created with 'default_currency' => 'USD'. Task description in task.json line 5: 'verify the store's default currency is set to USD'. Confirmed in README success criteria (line 25) and verifier.py (line 137: if currency == 'USD').

privileged_info_summary: The task involves configuring tax compliance for a synthetic Drupal Commerce test store named 'Urban Electronics' located in San Francisco, California. All metadata claims are verified: store_id is 1 (the default store created by setup scripts), initial timezone is UTC (changed to America/Los_Angeles), initial address is '456 Market Street' (changed to '100 Commerce Boulevard'), initial currency is USD, initial tax registrations count is 0 (US to be added), and no 'taxmanager' user exists initially (to be created with email tax@urbanelectronics.com). The commerce_tax module is pre-enabled during Drupal setup. All expected values correspond exactly to the task requirements defined in the task description.
